_comment: Copy to roles/<role_id>.json. The roles/ directory is gitignored.
title: Senior Backend Engineer
openness: Open to fully remote roles in Europe and relocation to Dublin for the right opportunity.
_openness_note: Shown on the CV banner under the headline. Overrides profile.openness. Remove this key to inherit the profile-level default.
_additional_experience_note: Set to [] to suppress the 'Additional Relevant Experience' section for this role (e.g. tight one-page submission). Remove the key entirely to inherit profile.additional_experience.

custom_answers.why_company: Optional free-text answer for a specific 'Why us?' field

paragraphs: Opening paragraph — specific hook to the company/role...
Paragraph 3 — fit with this specific JD, address key requirements...

experience_overrides._comment: Optional: override specific bullets for this role. Leave empty to use profile defaults.

bullets: Overridden bullet 1 specific to this application...

notes: Add any notes about this application here — e.g. referral contact, deadline, status.
